name: Claude Code Workspace
description: Non-premium Coder workspace template for Claude Code with VS Code, web terminal, optional code-server, Bedrock IAM-role support, direct Claude CLI app shortcuts, and optional MCP configuration.

mcp.notes: The template can inject a generated MCP configuration into Claude Code without requiring Coder Premium AI Bridge or Tasks. It installs Claude directly in the workspace, supports Bedrock via IAM-role/default AWS credential chain (with optional bearer-token fallback), and uses standard Coder apps for the post-spinup experience. Review MCP server packages and token scopes before enabling them in production.
